title: Aarhus gav mig big tech-alternativer. Men er jeg for blank til open source?
summary: Jeg plejer at have den fineste pakke-løsning fra Google, der aldrig bøvler. Jeg har aldrig før hurtigt skullet finde et europæisk alternativ til mit europæiske alternativ, som var i udu forleden. Men jeg er ikke alene, for på V2 Security i Aarhus delte konference-gæsterne deres egne erfaringer med europæisk open source.
explanation: Nyhedens indhold handler om en konference i Aarhus om europæisk open source-løsninger, uden at nævne nogen konkret cyberangreb, databrud eller sikkerhedshændelse, der rammer Danmark.

title: New Chrome Vulnerability Let Malicious Extensions Escalate Privileges via Gemini Panel
summary:

The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-0628 (CVSS score: 8.8), has been described as a case of insufficient policy enforcement in the WebView tag. It was patched by Google in early January 2026

title: Google Develops Merkle Tree Certificates to Enable Quantum-Resistant HTTPS in Chrome
summary:
Google has announced a new program in its Chrome browser to ensure that HTTPS certificates are secure against the future risk posed by quantum computers.
